AS TO DEFENDANT D'ONOFRIO, ROGER (OWNER, KRAV MAGA TRAINING CENTER AKA CONTACT COMBAT SYSTEMS) FOLAND, BARRY (OWNER, KRAV MAGA TRAINING CENTER AKA CONTACT COMBAT TRAINING SYSTEMS) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-06-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BITTNER, ELISABETH A. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
